table_sql.known_wallet_source_registry_v1:
CREATE TABLE known_wallet_source_registry_v1 (
    source_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    source_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    trust_tier TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_role TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SEED_SIGNAL_NOT_DECISION',
    source_url_or_ref_hash TEXT,
    license_or_terms_note TEXT,
    allowed_use TEXT NOT NULL,
    not_allowed_use TEXT NOT NULL,
    external_label_signal_only INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    onchain_behavior_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    import_mode TEXT NOT NULL,
    review_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PLANNED',
    api_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    external_network_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    decision_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    hard_deny_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    clean_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    paper_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    live_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    last_checked_utc TEXT,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    CHECK (trust_tier IN ('A','B','C','D')),
    CHECK (external_label_signal_only IN (0,1)),
    CHECK (onchain_behavior_required = 1),
    CHECK (api_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (external_network_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (decision_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (hard_deny_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (clean_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (paper_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (live_allowed = 0)
)
table_sql.known_wallet_seed_queue_v1:
CREATE TABLE known_wallet_seed_queue_v1 (
    seed_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    source_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    chain TEXT NOT NULL,
    wallet_address TEXT NOT NULL,
    label_text TEXT NOT NULL,
    label_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    entity_hint TEXT,
    confidence_hint REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0,
    trust_tier TEXT NOT NULL,
    freshness_band TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNKNOWN_DATE',
    import_mode TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'REVIEWED_SEED',
    quarantine_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NOT_QUARANTINED',
    external_label_signal_only INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    onchain_behavior_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    decision_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    hard_deny_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    clean_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    paper_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    live_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    source_ref_hash TEXT,
    observed_at_utc TEXT,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(source_id) REFERENCES known_wallet_source_registry_v1(source_id),
    CHECK (trust_tier IN ('A','B','C','D')),
    CHECK (external_label_signal_only IN (0,1)),
    CHECK (onchain_behavior_required = 1),
    CHECK (decision_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (hard_deny_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (clean_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (paper_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (live_allowed = 0)
)
table_sql.known_wallet_quarantine_seed_v1:
CREATE TABLE known_wallet_quarantine_seed_v1 (
    quarantine_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    source_id TEXT,
    seed_uid TEXT,
    chain TEXT NOT NULL,
    wallet_address TEXT NOT NULL,
    label_text TEXT,
    label_type TEXT,
    quarantine_reason TEXT NOT NULL,
    quarantine_lane TEXT NOT NULL,
    trust_tier TEXT NOT NULL,
    review_required INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    import_blocked INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    decision_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    hard_deny_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    clean_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    paper_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    live_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    updated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(source_id) REFERENCES known_wallet_source_registry_v1(source_id),
    FOREIGN KEY(seed_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_seed_queue_v1(seed_uid),
    CHECK (review_required = 1),
    CHECK (import_blocked = 1),
    CHECK (decision_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (hard_deny_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (clean_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (paper_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (live_allowed = 0)
)
table_sql.known_wallet_label_quality_events_v1:
CREATE TABLE known_wallet_label_quality_events_v1 (
    quality_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    source_id TEXT,
    seed_uid TEXT,
    check_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    severity TEXT NOT NULL,
    check_status TEXT NOT NULL,
    blocks_import INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    quality_score_delta REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0,
    message TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(source_id) REFERENCES known_wallet_source_registry_v1(source_id),
    FOREIGN KEY(seed_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_seed_queue_v1(seed_uid),
    CHECK (blocks_import IN (0,1))
)
table_sql.known_wallet_label_conflict_events_v1:
CREATE TABLE known_wallet_label_conflict_events_v1 (
    conflict_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    chain TEXT NOT NULL,
    wallet_address TEXT NOT NULL,
    conflict_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_a_id TEXT,
    source_b_id TEXT,
    seed_a_uid TEXT,
    seed_b_uid TEXT,
    resolution_policy TEXT NOT NULL,
    decision_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    hard_deny_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    clean_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    paper_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    live_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(source_a_id) REFERENCES known_wallet_source_registry_v1(source_id),
    FOREIGN KEY(source_b_id) REFERENCES known_wallet_source_registry_v1(source_id),
    FOREIGN KEY(seed_a_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_seed_queue_v1(seed_uid),
    FOREIGN KEY(seed_b_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_seed_queue_v1(seed_uid),
    CHECK (decision_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (hard_deny_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (clean_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (paper_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (live_allowed = 0)
)

real_apply_plan.why_not_direct_21I: 21G3 rows are synthetic dirty dry-run rows; writing them to live DB would poison wallet seed queue.
required_before_21i: Provide or generate a real wallet seed batch from approved sources or manual operator list.
Every source_id must exist in known_wallet_source_registry_v1.
All decision/trade fields must remain zero.
Quarantine rows must use import_blocked=1 and review_required=1.
CEX rows must keep hard_merge_allowed=0 and root_funder_allowed=0.
real_apply_plan.future_real_approval_sentence: PHASE21I wallet seed queue real için onay veriyorum

phase21i_contract.source_of_truth: manual/approved real wallet batch, not synthetic dryrun rows

future_real_approval_sentence: PHASE21I wallet seed queue real için onay veriyorum

    quality_score_delta REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0,
    message TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(source_id) REFERENCES known_wallet_source_registry_v1(source_id),
    FOREIGN KEY(seed_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_seed_queue_v1(seed_uid),
    CHECK (blocks_import IN (0,1))
)
table_sql.known_wallet_label_conflict_events_v1:
CREATE TABLE known_wallet_label_conflict_events_v1 (
    conflict_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    chain TEXT NOT NULL,
    wallet_address TEXT NOT NULL,
    conflict_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_a_id TEXT,
    source_b_id TEXT,
    seed_a_uid TEXT,
    seed_b_uid TEXT,
    resolution_policy TEXT NOT NULL,
    decision_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    hard_deny_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    clean_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    paper_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    live_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(source_a_id) REFERENCES known_wallet_source_registry_v1(source_id),
    FOREIGN KEY(source_b_id) REFERENCES known_wallet_source_registry_v1(source_id),
    FOREIGN KEY(seed_a_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_seed_queue_v1(seed_uid),
    FOREIGN KEY(seed_b_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_seed_queue_v1(seed_uid),
    CHECK (decision_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (hard_deny_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (clean_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (paper_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (live_allowed = 0)
)
table_sql.known_wallet_cex_classification_events_v:
CREATE TABLE known_wallet_cex_classification_events_v1 (
    cex_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    seed_uid TEXT,
    chain TEXT NOT NULL,
    wallet_address TEXT NOT NULL,
    cex_address_class TEXT NOT NULL,
    cex_bridge_lane TEXT NOT NULL,
    cex_bridge_evidence_type TEXT,
    bridge_confidence REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0,
    hard_merge_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    root_funder_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    hard_deny_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    clean_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    paper_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    live_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    non_cex_supporting_evidence_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(seed_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_seed_queue_v1(seed_uid),
    CHECK (hard_merge_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (root_funder_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (hard_deny_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (clean_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (paper_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (live_allowed = 0)
)
table_sql.known_wallet_mev_noise_classification_ev:
CREATE TABLE known_wallet_mev_noise_classification_events_v1 (
    mev_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    seed_uid TEXT,
    chain TEXT NOT NULL,
    wallet_address TEXT NOT NULL,
    mev_actor_class TEXT NOT NULL,
    mev_noise_lane TEXT NOT NULL,
    same_block_buy_sell_flag INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    sandwich_pattern_flag INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    arbitrage_loop_flag INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    investor_whale_interpretation_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    hard_deny_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    clean_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    paper_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    live_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(seed_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_seed_queue_v1(seed_uid),
    CHECK (same_block_buy_sell_flag IN (0,1)),
    CHECK (sandwich_pattern_flag IN (0,1)),
    CHECK (arbitrage_loop_flag IN (0,1)),
    CHECK (investor_whale_interpretation_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (hard_deny_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (clean_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (paper_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (live_allowed = 0)
)
table_sql.known_wallet_shadow_label_events_v1:
CREATE TABLE known_wallet_shadow_label_events_v1 (
    shadow_event_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    seed_uid TEXT,
    chain TEXT NOT NULL,
    wallet_address TEXT NOT NULL,
    identity_status TEXT NOT NULL,
    shadow_label TEXT NOT NULL,
    shadow_level TEXT NOT NULL,
    shadow_confidence REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.0,
    suppression_reason TEXT,
    non_cex_supporting_evidence_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    real_world_identity_guarantee INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    temporary_risk_evidence INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    hard_deny_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    clean_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    paper_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    live_allowed INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    FOREIGN KEY(seed_uid) REFERENCES known_wallet_seed_queue_v1(seed_uid),
    CHECK (real_world_identity_guarantee = 0),
    CHECK (temporary_risk_evidence = 1),
    CHECK (hard_deny_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (clean_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (paper_allowed = 0),
    CHECK (live_allowed = 0)
)
table_sql.known_wallet_source_registry_readmodel_v:
CREATE TABLE known_wallet_source_registry_readmodel_v1 (
    readmodel_uid TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    chain TEXT NOT NULL,
    generated_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    seed_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    quarantine_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    conflict_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    cex_event_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    mev_noise_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    shadow_label_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    payload_json TEXT NOT NULL,
    payload_sha256 TEXT NOT NULL,
    created_at_utc TEXT NOT NULL
)
